sense.definition: a large piece of meat or fish cut into thick slices

examples.x: She seasoned the steak with salt and pepper before grilling it to perfection on the barbecue.
They enjoyed a romantic dinner at home, complete with candlelight and a perfectly cooked steak.
The butcher recommended a thick-cut steak for the barbecue, ensuring it stayed juicy and flavorful.
She served the grilled steak with a side of mashed potatoes and sautéed vegetables for a hearty meal.
He prefers his steak cooked rare, with a charred crust on the outside and a warm, red center.

sense.definition: meat cut from the chest of an animal, especially a cow

examples.x: I tried my hand at making homemade corned beef brisket.
The restaurant featured a signature dish of slow-roasted brisket.
We visited a local smokehouse renowned for its mouthwatering brisket.

sense.definition: a cut of beef taken from the shoulder area of the animal, known for its flavorful and versatile qualities

examples.x: He marinated a chuck roast overnight and slow-cooked it to perfection.
My mother visited the butcher shop and purchased a chuck steak.

sense.definition: a cut of meat from the lower portion of an animal's leg, known for its rich flavor when cooked

examples.x: My grandmother slow-cooked a lamb shank in a flavorful broth.
They organized a cozy dinner party and served braised pork shanks as the main course.
The chef prepared a delightful osso buco using veal shanks simmered in a rich tomato sauce.
The lamb shank was marinated with herbs and spices before being grilled to perfection.
Slow-cooked beef shank yields succulent, fall-off-the-bone meat.

sense.definition: a meat cut that includes a bone with an elongated shape
a meaty cut of beef taken from the tail of a cow

examples.x: They attended a culinary workshop and learned how to make oxtail dumplings.

sense.definition: the joint or knuckle of a pig's front or hind leg, often used in cooking for its flavorful meat

examples.x: The butcher displayed a freshly ham hock in the shop.
We hosted a backyard barbecue and smoked a ham hock to perfection.

sense.definition: a cut of meat taken from the front part of the lower leg of an animal

examples.x: He prepared a tasty beef stew, using tender pieces of shin meat.

sense.definition: beef that is taken from an animal's back, typically a cow, which is of high quality
a lean and flavorful cut of meat located on the underside of an animal, typically used for dishes like fajitas or stir-fries
meat from the upper part of the back legs of a cow, which is of high quality

examples.x: The restaurant featured a signature dish of sliced rump, cooked to perfection.

sense.definition: a piece of meat with one or more rib bones

examples.x: She visited a renowned steakhouse and savored a mouthwatering plate of grilled lamb ribs.
They hosted a backyard cookout, serving mouthwatering ribs that were a hit with their guests.
He grilled a rack of ribs for the barbecue, marinated in a tangy barbecue sauce.
She ordered a half rack of baby back ribs, glazed with a sweet and spicy sauce.
He enjoys smoking ribs on his backyard smoker, using a blend of hardwoods for a smoky flavor.

sense.definition: a tender and well-marbled cut of meat located towards the back of an animal

examples.x: We attended a cooking class where we learned how to prepare a delicious short loin roast.
We gathered for a summer cookout and savored delicious short loin burgers.

sense.definition: meat that is cut from near the backbone of a pig or cow, which is of high quality

examples.x: A gourmet food truck serves mouthwatering tenderloin sliders with melted cheese and caramelized onions.
Street vendors in a bustling market grill flavorful tenderloin skewers for hungry customers.

sense.definition: a cut of pork taken from the lower part of the pig's rib cage

examples.x: Each dish of spare ribs was coated in a secret family recipe sauce.
Friends gather around the grill as spare ribs slowly cook over charcoal.
In a lively street food market, a food stall specializes in Asian-inspired spare rib tacos.

sense.definition: a pig's foot that is cooked as food

examples.x: At a countryside farm festival, attendees line up for a taste of the famous trotter barbecue.
The street vendor served crispy trotter bites with a tangy dipping sauce at the food market.

sense.definition: a small cut of meat, typically taken from the rib or loin

examples.x: My friends enjoyed smoky beef rib chops at the countryside barbecue.

sense.definition: a fatty and flavorful cut of meat obtained from the underside of a pig

examples.x: The street vendor at the night market skillfully grilled savory pork belly skewers.
Visitors at the food truck festival lined up for flavorful pork belly tacos with pickled onions and cilantro-lime sauce.

sense.definition: the meat from the hind leg of a pig that is typically cured, similar to ham
a cut of pork that consists primarily of the fatty layer beneath the skin

examples.x: The bakery incorporated finely diced fatback into savory pie crusts for flaky results.
The cook rendered fatback to make lard for baking and frying in the farmhouse kitchen.

sense.definition: a pork cut from the upper shoulder, used in barbecue and slow-cooking for its rich flavor and marbling, often for pulled pork and stews

examples.x: The gourmet sandwich shop featured sliced Boston butt, pickles, and mustard on a crusty baguette.
The rustic countryside wedding featured carved Boston butt roast with roasted vegetables.

sense.definition: a thin piece of meat that is cut into a thick slice and usually broiled or fried

examples.x: In a trendy vegetarian café, guests enjoy flavorful chickpea and pork cutlets.
The street vendor served crispy chicken cutlet sandwiches with lettuce and mayonnaise.

sense.definition: meat cut from the front part of the body of a bird

examples.x: The butcher sells boneless duck breasts, perfect for pan-searing or roasting.
They enjoyed a hearty meal of roasted pheasant breast, served with a savory cranberry sauce.
The chef prepared a gourmet dish of quail breast stuffed with wild mushrooms and herbs.

sense.definition: the lower joint of the leg of a fowl, eaten as food

examples.x: Guests at the barbecue party enjoyed smoky grilled drumsticks with tangy barbecue sauce.
The food truck offered crispy fried chicken drumsticks with secret spices.

sense.definition: a small, tender cut of lamb meat attached to the rib bone, typically taken from the rib, loin, or shoulder

examples.x: She grilled a lamb chop for dinner.
The lamb chops were seasoned with rosemary and garlic.
He ordered a plate of lamb chops at the restaurant.
Lamb chops are best cooked to medium rare for tenderness.
The chef prepared lamb chops with a mint sauce.

sense.definition: a lean and tender cut of meat from the back of the pig, commonly used for roasting

examples.x: The holiday dinner featured juicy pork loin, tenderly roasted with flavorful herbs.

sense.definition: meat from the wing of a duck, chicken, etc., eaten as food
a piece of meat from a pig or lamb which is attached to the front ribs

examples.x: Chefs in the professional kitchen slow-cooked racks of ribs with a finger-licking barbecue sauce.
The butcher shop offered expertly cut racks of dry-aged beef.

sense.definition: a cut of beef attached to the rib bones

examples.x: Short ribs are my son's favorite cut of meat, especially when they're slow-cooked to perfection.
Unfortunately, the price of short ribs can be quite high.

sense.definition: meat taken from the upper part of the front leg of an animal

examples.x: The family enjoyed a comforting meal of slow-cooked beef shoulder with mashed potatoes and roasted vegetables.

sense.definition: a cut of meat that comes from the lower belly or underside of the cow

examples.x: At a family reunion picnic, the buffet table showcased a classic beef plate roast.

sense.definition: a portion of meat, typically from the lower limb of an animal
a lean cut of meat, typically from the hindquarters of an animal
a cut of pork, typically from the upper part of the shoulder

examples.x: Families in the scenic park enjoyed picnic sandwiches with thinly sliced picnic shoulder and fresh toppings.
The farm-to-table restaurant featured a signature dish of picnic shoulder with creamy sauce.

sense.definition: a cut from the rib area of an animal, often known for its tender and flavorful qualities

examples.x: Everyone enjoyed the side that I cooked with garlic, butter and seasoned fries.
The cozy tavern served a hearty plate of grilled side.

sense.definition: a thick slice of beef that is often cooked by grilling

examples.x: Guests at the outdoor wedding reception enjoye grilled beefsteaks as the main course.
The gourmet cooking class focused on mastering the art of cooking the perfect beefsteak.
She prefers her beefsteak seasoned simply with salt and pepper to savor its natural flavors.
He ordered a juicy beefsteak cooked medium-rare with a side of mashed potatoes.

sense.definition: a piece of meat cut from the body of an animal

examples.x: I was enjoying every single cut of marinated chicken, beef, and pork.
She purchased a tenderloin cut from the butcher, intending to grill it for dinner.

sense.definition: the soft part of the body of an animal, between the skin and bones

examples.x: He prepared a mouthwatering dish with the tender and flavorful flesh of the lamb.
The roasted duck had a crispy skin and succulent flesh.
The butcher carefully trimmed the excess fat from the flesh of the meat before packaging it for sale.
She marinated the chicken breasts overnight to infuse the flesh with flavor before grilling them.
The predator tore into the flesh of its prey, devouring the meat with voracious hunger.

sense.definition: the leg of a lamb or an adult sheep that is eaten as food

examples.x: She prepared a gourmet gigot of chicken, stuffed with herbs and wrapped in bacon.
They roasted a tender and juicy gigot of lamb.

sense.definition: a large cut of meat from the area where two or more bones meet, typically including a part of the bone

examples.x: I would like to have sandwiches made with thinly sliced turkey joint for lunch.
My dad grilled a succulent pork joint with barbecue sauce for a backyard cookout.
She purchased a beef joint from the butcher, intending to roast it for Sunday dinner.

sense.definition: a thin, boneless slice of meat that is coated in breadcrumbs and fried
the hindquarter or leg of an animal, often referring to a cut of meat from that region

examples.x: He marinated a haunch of lamb overnight, then grilled it to perfection.
I ordered a plate of roasted haunch of rabbit, accompanied by a delicate mustard sauce.

sense.definition: a cut of meat from the lower part of an animal's leg, often used for its rich flavor and gelatinous texture
a cut of meat derived from the neck region of an animal, typically used in stews, soups, and braised dishes

examples.x: He prepared a flavorful pork neck curry, simmered in a fragrant blend of spices and coconut milk.
She enjoyed a comforting bowl of chicken noodle soup, with tender pieces of neck meat.

sense.definition: a cut of beef taken from the hindquarters of the animal

examples.x: He prepared a mouthwatering rump steak salad, featuring grilled steak slices, mixed greens and tomatoes.
The Korean-style barbecue featured thinly sliced rump steak, marinated in a flavorful soy-based sauce.

sense.definition: a cut of beef from the loin region that contains a T-shaped bone, with tenderloin on one side and strip steak on the other

examples.x: The special occasion dinner included a perfectly seared T-bone steak.

sense.definition: the upper part of a bird's leg, often used as a meaty portion for cooking and eating

examples.x: He grilled succulent chicken thighs, seasoned with a blend of spices, for a flavorful and juicy dinner.
I asked my mother to prepare a delicious honey-glazed roasted turkey thigh for dinner.

sense.definition: a Y-shaped bone between the neck and breast of a bird

examples.x: He collected wishbones from different birds and displayed them as a unique collection.
They made a wish and pulled apart the wishbone, hoping for good luck.

sense.definition: (of food, particularly meat or fish) having the bones taken out for easier consumption
containing bones or an abundance of bones
(of meat) containing a small or no amount of fat

examples.x: He opted for lean ground turkey instead of beef for a healthier burger option.
She enjoyed a lean cut of grilled chicken breast, low in fat and high in protein.

sense.definition: lacking skin or having had the skin removed
a tender cut of beef taken from the short loin, characterized by its distinctive strip of fat

examples.x: He grilled a juicy strip steak, seasoned with a blend of herbs and spices.
My grandmother made strip steak kebabs, skewering marinated steak cubes with colorful bell peppers and onions.

sense.definition: small strips of fish or poultry that are typically breaded and deep-fried, similar to fish fingers or chicken tenders

examples.x: She enjoyed the tender and succulent goujons of chicken, coated in a seasoned breadcrumb crust.
She made a satisfying meal with goujons of cod, paired with a fresh salad and a squeeze of lemon.
The kids enjoyed the bite-sized goujons of chicken, perfect for dipping in their favorite sauces.

sense.definition: small strips or cubes of bacon or salt pork that are typically used as a flavoring ingredient in French cuisine

examples.x: I discovered a pack of lardons in the back of my home fridge.
The creamy potato salad was enhanced with crispy lardons of bacon.

sense.definition: a piece of boneless meat or fish cut from near the ribs of an animal
a large section of meat initially separated from the carcass during butchering, containing major muscle groups and bones
a smaller portion of meat that is taken from a primal cut during butchering, typically containing specific muscles or sections
a flavorful cut of beef taken from the rib section of the cow, known for its tenderness and marbling
a rolled dish typically made by wrapping meat, fish, or vegetables around a filling and then cooking it

examples.x: The tender chicken roulade was filled with spinach and cheese.

sense.definition: the meat from the breast portion of a turkey, typically boneless and skinless, and commonly used in cooking for its lean and flavorful meat

examples.x: She made turkey breast wraps, filling tortillas with sliced turkey, cucumber, and a creamy ranch dressing.
The roasted turkey breast, thinly sliced, was the star of the Thanksgiving dinner.
